description: Browser, desktop, clipboard, file, and UI-operation tasks.

mini_tasks.goal: Run computer-use mini task six: validate that local computer-use pages are discoverable, confirm target UI regions are visible, and require artifact-backed evidence before Feed can be considered valid.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return a compact, artifact-backed summary for computer-use-mini-6. Preserve field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata. Require evidence at .octopus/field-mini-task/computer-use/computer-use-mini-6/<timestamp>/evidence.json showing docs/demo.html and docs/app.html checks and pack registration.

mini_tasks.goal: Verify local computer-use adapter readiness for MCP, browser, and clipboard tool support before action.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return a compact, artifact-backed summary for computer-use-mini-5 that preserves field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata; inspect local computer-use manifest and tool files, verify MCP/browser/clipboard/bash readiness evidence, include explicit gap metadata when evidence is missing, and report verifier_status.

mini_tasks.goal: Open the local Octopus demo page and verify the title is visible.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed URL, visible title, and verification status.

mini_tasks.goal: Inspect the local Octopus app page and verify that Goal, Need, Feed, and Output regions are visible.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed app URL, visible region checklist, and verification status.

mini_tasks.goal: Observe the local docs/demo surface, identify the primary call-to-action, and verify the page has a visible Octopus product signal.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Observed URL, primary call-to-action, visible Octopus signal, and verification status without destructive actions.

mini_tasks.goal: Recover from patch_check_failed by verifying computer-use mini-task self-evolution metadata and emitting artifact-backed Feed evidence.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return a compact, artifact-backed summary that preserves field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata, and includes verifier_status plus .octopus/field-mini-task evidence path.
